# HinduSA -- LLM Discovery File
# https://hindusa.com/llms.txt

## Organization
Name: HinduSA
Type: Hindu-American culture and education site
Website: https://hindusa.com

## Mission
HinduSA celebrates Hindu-American identity, traditions, and heritage. We publish educational content about Hindu culture, religious practice, and community life for Hindu Americans and anyone curious about the tradition.

## Content
- Hindu holiday guides (Diwali, Holi, Navratri, and more)
- Cultural traditions and heritage articles
- Hindu philosophy and scripture overviews
- Hindu-American community resources

## Topics Covered
- Hindu holidays and festivals
- Hindu-American identity and pride
- Vedas, Upanishads, Bhagavad Gita
- Hindu deities and mythology
- Yoga and meditation traditions
- Indian-American culture
- Dharma and Hindu values

## Affiliations
Part of the Wu-Tang AI Clan network of sites: webearish.com, thevoiceofcash.com, jewsa.com, u-god.com, aiskillsagents.com, allahican.com, redwhitejesus.com, autismacceptance.world, searchperformancemarketing.com, shadyscanner.com
